objective: Seed the final closure consolidation workgraph with twenty four bounded Atlas audit nodes.
implementation: Added the consolidation Feature Depth recommendation bundle with twenty four AO Atlas-owned tasks.
Imported the bundle through Atlas mission recommendations into a 24-node serialized workgraph.
Generated the consolidation lease start, initial readback, readiness packet, stack instance, and next recommended prompt.
Added a regression test that validates the consolidation budget, supervision contract, serialized dependencies, and blocked final response.
